name: io.github.Hashlock-Tech/hashlock
title: Hashlock — Intent Trading Protocol
description: Intent-based crypto exchange protocol by Hashlock-Tech. Create, commit, validate, and parse trading intents for swapping ETH, ERC20 tokens, and ERC721 NFTs across EVM chains (Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Base) with sealed-bid privacy and KYC attestation tiers. Not the cryptographic hashlock primitive used in HTLCs.

environmentVariables.name: HASHLOCK_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Hashlock API key for authentication
